sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96457" key="stemmati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στεμμᾰτ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who wears a wreath</tr_>, of Apollo, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:20:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.20.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
